title: HISports Anti-Theft Trailer Lock 70 mm Padlock Hitch Lock Trailer for Trailer Anti-Theft Security Trailer Anti-Theft Lock for Car Trailers
features: High Quality: Trailer lock hitch anti theft made of the high-quality stainless steel body, the Hitch Lock Trailer is very resistant to corrosion, it has the advantage of high strength and safety. With waterproof function, it can be used outdoors or indoors

High Safety: This sturdy padlock Padlock for trailer couplings with pinch protection, this round shackle lock has the ideal stability and a high level of anti-pick. Which perfectly complements your drawbar lock. Padlock offers a high level of theft protection due to the construction

Optimal Stability: Trailer hitch lock with pinch protection and a shackle thickness of 8 mm, the padlock guarantees ideal stability and a high level of anti-pick. Most of the shackle is hidden in the lock body, significantly reducing the attack points of the usual attack tools

Wide Range of Applications: the padlock is very suitable for indoor and outdoor use, including trailers, garages, sheds, cupboards, gates, containers, roller gates, vending machines or door latches, so bicycles, garden tools, etc. The weatherproof padlock provides security at your home or workplace

Good after sales service: As a reliable brand, HISports strives to provide its customers with perfect products and a pleasant shopping experience. Your satisfaction is our greatest pursuit. If you have any questions about our products, please feel free to contact HISports and we will contact you as soon as possible. Please rest assured that you are buying it. Thank you!
